mapper.select: SELECT seq_name, max_id, step, increment_by, min_value, max_value, cycle, mode, start_with, description, update_time, create_time FROM sequence_config WHERE seq_name = #{seqName} FOR UPDATE
SELECT seq_name, max_id, step, increment_by, min_value, max_value, cycle, mode, start_with, description, update_time, create_time FROM sequence_config WHERE seq_name = #{seqName}
SELECT seq_name, max_id, step, increment_by, min_value, max_value, cycle, mode, start_with, description, update_time, create_time FROM sequence_config
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sequence_config (seq_name, mode, step, increment_by, min_value, max_value, cycle, start_with, description) VALUES (#{seqName}, #{mode, typeHandler=com.ccb.jx.seq.repository.ModeTypeHandler}, #{step}, #{incrementBy}, #{minValue}, #{maxValue}, #{cycle}, #{startWith}, #{description})

INSERT INTO sequence_record (seq_name, start_value, end_value, instance_id, status, alloc_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{seqName}, #{startValue}, #{endValue}, #{instanceId}, #{status}, #{allocTime}, #{expireTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, seq_name, start_value, end_value, instance_id, status, alloc_time, expire_time FROM sequence_record WHERE status = 'ALLOCATED'
AND instance_id = #{instanceId}
